tests.name: retries derivation and succeeds when first save throws a duplicate-key error (MySQL ER_DUP_ENTRY)
retries derivation and succeeds when first save throws a SQLite UNIQUE constraint error
throws ConflictException (409-class) after SLUG_RETRY_LIMIT duplicate-key failures (exhausted)

acceptance_criteria.description: Retry derivation and succeed on dup-key (MySQL + SQLite)
Bounded retries (3); exhaustion = ConflictException 409, non-dup errors propagate
deriveUniqueSlug write paths covered: count=1 (create only)
JSDoc on affected methods reflects retry semantics

tester_fix_applied.description: MySQL ER_DUP_ENTRY test had 3 findOne mock calls but retry flow requires 4. Added missing null call for attempt-2 base-slug check.
